+   X <- matrix(c(1:4, 1, 6:8), nrow = 2L)
+   
+   Y0 <- apply(X, MARGIN = 1L, FUN = table)
+   Y1 <- future_apply(X, MARGIN = 1L, FUN = table)
+   print(Y1)
+   stopifnot(all.equal(Y1, Y0, check.attributes = FALSE)) ## FIXME
+ 
+   Y2 <- future_apply(X, MARGIN = 1L, FUN = "table")
+   print(Y2)
+   stopifnot(identical(Y2, Y1))
+ 
+   Y0 <- apply(X, MARGIN = 1L, FUN = stats::quantile)
+   Y1 <- future_apply(X, MARGIN = 1L, FUN = stats::quantile)
+   print(Y1)
+   stopifnot(all.equal(Y1, Y0))
+ 
+   x <- cbind(x1 = 3, x2 = c(4:1, 2:5))
+   names(dimnames(x)) <- c("row", "col")
+   x3 <- array(x, dim = c(dim(x), 3),
+               dimnames = c(dimnames(x), list(C = paste0("cop.", 1:3))))
+   
+   y0 <- apply(x, MARGIN = 2L, FUN = identity)
+   stopifnot(identical(y0, x))
+   y1 <- future_apply(x, MARGIN = 2L, FUN = identity)
+   print(y1)
+   stopifnot(identical(y1, y0))
+

+   stopifnot(identical(y1, y0))
+

[09:34:58.300]                       stop(ex)
[09:34:58.300]                     })
[09:34:58.300]                     stopifnot(file_test("-f", pathname_tmp))

[09:34:58.300]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:34:58.300]                   {
[09:34:58.300]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:34:58.300]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:34:58.300]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:34:58.300]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:34:58.300]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:34:58.300]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:34:58.300]                       if (muffled) 
[09:34:58.300]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")

[09:34:58.673]                   save_rds <- function (object, pathname, ...) 
[09:34:58.673]                   {
[09:34:58.673]                     pathname_tmp <- sprintf("%s.tmp", pathname)
[09:34:58.673]                     if (file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {
[09:34:58.673]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)
[09:34:58.673]                       stopf("Cannot save RDS file because a temporary save file already exists: %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)", 
[09:34:58.673]                         sQuote(pathname_tmp), fi_tmp[["size"]], 
[09:34:58.673]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]])
[09:34:58.673]                     }
[09:34:58.673]                     tryCatch({
[09:34:58.673]                       saveRDS(object, file = pathname_tmp, ...)
[09:34:58.673]                     }, error = function(ex) {
[09:34:58.673]                       msg <- conditionMessage(ex)
[09:34:58.673]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)
[09:34:58.673]                       msg <- sprintf("saveRDS() failed to save to temporary file %s (%.0f bytes; last modified on %s). The reason was: %s", 
[09:34:58.673]                         sQuote(pathname_tmp), fi_tmp[["size"]], 
[09:34:58.673]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]], msg)
[09:34:58.673]                       ex$message <- msg
[09:34:58.673]                       stop(ex)
[09:34:58.673]                     })
[09:34:58.673]                     stopifnot(file_test("-f", pathname_tmp))
[09:34:58.673]                     res <- file.rename(from = pathname_tmp, to = pathname)
[09:34:58.673]                     if (!res || file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {
[09:34:58.673]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)
[09:34:58.673]                       fi <- file.info(pathname)
[09:34:58.673]                       msg <- sprintf("save_rds() failed to rename temporary save file %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s) to %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)", 
[09:34:58.673]                         sQuote(pathname_tmp), fi_tmp[["size"]], 
[09:34:58.673]                         fi_tmp[["mtime"]], sQuote(pathname), 
[09:34:58.673]                         fi[["size"]], fi[["mtime"]])
[09:34:58.673]                       stop(msg)
[09:34:58.673]                     }
[09:34:58.673]                     invisible(pathname)
[09:34:58.673]                   }
[09:34:58.673]                   saveImmediateCondition <- function (cond, path = immediateConditionsPath(rootPath = rootPath), 
[09:34:58.673]                     rootPath = tempdir()) 
[09:34:58.673]                   {
[09:34:58.673]                     obj <- list(time = Sys.time(), condition = cond)
[09:34:58.673]                     file <- tempfile(pattern = class(cond)[1], 
[09:34:58.673]                       tmpdir = path, fileext = ".rds")
[09:34:58.673]                     save_rds(obj, file)
[09:34:58.673]                   }
[09:34:58.673]                   saveImmediateCondition(cond, path = "/tmp/RtmpXeIOCI/.future/immediateConditions")
[09:34:58.673]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:34:58.673]                   {
[09:34:58.673]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:34:58.673]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:34:58.673]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:34:58.673]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:34:58.673]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:34:58.673]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:34:58.673]                       if (muffled) 
[09:34:58.673]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:34:58.673]                     }
[09:34:58.673]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:34:58.673]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:34:58.673]                       if (muffled) 
[09:34:58.673]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:34:58.673]                     }
[09:34:58.673]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:34:58.673]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:34:58.673]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:34:58.673]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:34:58.673]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:34:58.673]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:34:58.673]                           name <- restart$name
[09:34:58.673]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:34:58.673]                             next
[09:34:58.673]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:34:58.673]                             next
[09:34:58.673]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:34:58.673]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:34:58.673]                           break
[09:34:58.673]                         }
[09:34:58.673]                       }
[09:34:58.673]                     }
[09:34:58.673]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:34:58.673]                   }
[09:34:58.673]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:34:58.673]                 })

[09:34:59.040]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:34:59.040]                   {
[09:34:59.040]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:34:59.040]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:34:59.040]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:34:59.040]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:34:59.040]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:34:59.040]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:34:59.040]                       if (muffled) 
[09:34:59.040]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:34:59.040]                     }
[09:34:59.040]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:34:59.040]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:34:59.040]                       if (muffled) 
[09:34:59.040]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:34:59.040]                     }
[09:34:59.040]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:34:59.040]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:34:59.040]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:34:59.040]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:34:59.040]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:34:59.040]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:34:59.040]                           name <- restart$name
[09:34:59.040]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:34:59.040]                             next
[09:34:59.040]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:34:59.040]                             next
[09:34:59.040]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:34:59.040]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:34:59.040]                           break
[09:34:59.040]                         }
[09:34:59.040]                       }
[09:34:59.040]                     }
[09:34:59.040]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:34:59.040]                   }
[09:34:59.040]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:34:59.040]                 })
[09:34:59.040]             }))

[09:34:59.302]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:34:59.302]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:34:59.302]                     next
[09:34:59.302]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:34:59.302]                 }
[09:34:59.302]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:34:59.302]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:34:59.302]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:34:59.302]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:34:59.302]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:34:59.302]                     next
[09:34:59.302]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:34:59.302]                 }
[09:34:59.302]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:34:59.302]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:34:59.302]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:34:59.302]             }
[09:34:59.302]             else {
[09:34:59.302]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:34:59.302]             }

[09:34:59.302]                   0L) {

[09:34:59.340]                   {
[09:34:59.340]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:34:59.340]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:34:59.340]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:34:59.340]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:34:59.340]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:34:59.340]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:34:59.340]                       if (muffled) 
[09:34:59.340]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:34:59.340]                     }
[09:34:59.340]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {

[09:35:00.124]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:00.124]                             next
[09:35:00.124]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:35:00.124]                             next
[09:35:00.124]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:00.124]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:00.124]                           break

[09:35:01.258]                 }
